description: Espresso recipe — not pour-over, tests extraction boundaries
sourceText:
Espresso Recipe for La Marzocco Linea Mini

Dose: 18g in, 36g out
Grind: Extra fine (Niche Zero at 12)
Water temp: 93°C
Pressure: 9 bar
Extraction time: 25-30 seconds

Pre-infusion: 3 seconds at low pressure
Main extraction: Pull until 36g in cup
Total time: 28-33 seconds

Look for a steady flow that starts thin and gradually thickens. Tiger striping on the surface is a good sign. The shot should taste sweet and balanced with no sourness or bitterness.

If the shot runs too fast, grind finer. If it chokes, grind coarser.
